name: Spinach Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole, cook onion and olive oil on high heat for 3-4 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking until tender.
2. Stir in rice, coating each grain. Add stock and salt to the rice. Cook, covered, on high heat for 5-8 minutes until boiling.
3. Continue cooking, covered, on medium (50% power) for 13-15 minutes until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender.
4. Drain spinach well, squeezing out excess liquid. Stir in spinach, Parmesan, and pepper into the rice. Let stand, covered, for 5 minutes.
5. Remove seeds from tomatoes and cut into 1/2-inch chunks. Stir tomato pieces into the rice.
